creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
Interesting tidbit:
I upgraded the BIOS on mine today, as I have not done this for a few months. The behavior has changed somewhat: I was not able to make it wedge while on external power, but the exact moment I yank the power cable, it hangs. This is reproducible. 

I am fairly certain I've done the same in the past as it's guaranteed to tickle some power state changes, but I'm thinking the udpated BIOS (which has Win11 support, whatever that actually means) has changed how things behave ever so slightly.

/Eirik
